mapper.select: SELECT cs.* FROM chapter_summary cs JOIN book_chapter bc ON cs.chapter_id = bc.id WHERE cs.book_id = #{bookId} AND cs.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY bc.sort_order DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cs.* FROM chapter_summary cs JOIN book_chapter bc ON cs.chapter_id = bc.id WHERE cs.book_id = #{bookId} AND bc.sort_order < #{sortOrder} AND cs.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY bc.sort_order DESC LIMIT 1
